STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WINE_FOX_STRIKE.title: Strike
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WINE_FOX_DEFEND.title: Defend
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BASIC_MINE.title: Basic Mining
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_PICKAXE.title: Stone Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_PICKAXE.descrip:
{IfUpgraded:show:Immediately gain 1 [gold]Plank[/gold] and 1 [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
|}At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BASIC_CRAFT.title: Basic Crafting
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FULL_ATTACK.title: Full Barrage
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FULL_ATTACK.descripti:
Spend all [gold]Materials[/gold].
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to the targeted enemy.
+{ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each material spent.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MINING_GEMS.title: Mining Gems
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANT_TREES.title: Plant Trees
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANT_TREES.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. At the start of next turn, gain [blue]{Plant:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEAM_ENGINE.title: Steam Engine
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEAM_ENGINE.descript: At the start of each turn, gain {Steam:diff()} [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_SWORD.title: Stone Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ARMOR.title: Iron Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRESS_W_TO_THINK_CHOO: Choose a card to add to your hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_DRILL.desc: Gain {Iron:diff()} [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold]. If [gold]Stress[/gold] was spent, refund 2 Energy.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_SWORD.title: Wooden Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_PICKAXE.title: Iron Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_PICKAXE.descript: The next {Times:diff()} times you gain resources, gain 3 additional [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold].{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_SWORD.title: Diamond Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_SWORD.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The first {Echoes:diff()} [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play each turn are played an additional time.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_SAW.title: Mechanical Saw
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_SAW.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Spend 1 [gold]Stress[/gold] to deal {BonusDamage:diff()} bonus damage.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_SWORD.title: Iron Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_SWORD.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next {Echoes:diff()} [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play are played an additional time.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTER_PATH.title: Change Course
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTER_PATH.descriptio: Spend 2 [gold]Plank[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block and draw 3 cards.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_ARMOR.title: Stone Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_ARMOR.descripti: Gain 7 [gold]Plating[/gold]. At the start of each turn, lose 1 Dexterity.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_POWER_UP.title: Shift, Accelerate, Take Off
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ZOMBIE.title: "White Zombie"
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRUSHING_WHEEL.title: Crushing Wheel
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRUSHING_WHEEL.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. This card costs 1 less for each time you spent [gold]Materials[/gold] this turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ENMERGENCY_REPAIR.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain {Block:diff()} Block, and gain 2 [gold]Stress[/gold] at the start of next turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIGHT_ASSAULT.title: Light Assault
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIGHT_ASSAULT.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. This card deals 1 less damage for each [gold]Material[/gold] you have.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EASY_PEASY.title: Easy Peasy
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EASY_PEASY.descriptio: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {EasyPeasy:diff()} additional cards at the start of each turn. Add 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold] at the start of each turn, increasing by 1 each turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALL_ITEM.title: All-Item Warehouse
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALL_ITEM.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Gain {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold], {Stone:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold], {Iron:diff()} [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold], and {Diamond:diff()} [gold]Diamond[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LESS_HOLIDAY.descript: [gold]Transform[/gold] a card in your hand into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Work Overtime+|Work Overtime}[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WORK_WORK.title: Work Overtime
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTERNATOR.title: Alternator
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NOTHING.title: Bare-Handed Strike
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_PICKAXE.title: Wooden Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_PICKAXE.descri: At the start of next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_ARMOR.title: Wooden Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_PICKAXE.des: Whenever you play a card in the same turn, gain 1 [gold]Plank[/gold], [gold]Cobblestone[/gold], [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold], and [gold]Diamond[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_COBBLESTONE_GENERATOR: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. Increase this by 2 each turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD_ATTACK.title: Shield Bash
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD_ATTACK.descrip: Deal damage to all enemies equal to twice your Block, then lose all Block. Draw 1 card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPINNING_HAND.title: Spinning Hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPINNING_HAND.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. This card costs 1 less for each time you [gold]Craft[/gold] this combat.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRODUCTION_DOCUMENT.d: Cards temporarily added to your deck during combat gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RECORD_PLAYER.title: Record Player
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MILK.title: Milk
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_VACANT_DOMAIN.title: Vacant Domain
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRESS_W_TO_THINK.desc: Look at the top 3 cards of your draw pile. Add 1 of them to your hand, and it gains Replay and Exhaust.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BACKUP_CRAFTING.title: Backup Workbench
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_TRADITIONALIST.title: Traditionalist
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SLASH_BLADE_WOOD.desc: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, gain {SlashBladeWoodPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DRIPSTONE_TRAP.title: Dripstone Trap
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DRIPSTONE_TRAP.descri: Consume all [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. For each one consumed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy and apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRE_PROCESSING.title: Preprocessing
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WORKBENCH_BACKPACK.de:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Craft[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost by 1.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP.title: Regroup
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Put 1 card from your discard pile into your hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP_CHOOSE: Choose a card from your discard pile to add to your hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CHANGE_EQUIPMENT.desc: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then shuffle {Cards:diff()} cards from your hand into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CHANGE_EQUIPMENT_CHOO: Choose 2 cards to shuffle back into your draw pile
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_ARMOR.title: Diamond Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_ARMOR.descrip: Gain {Armor:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold]. If you still have [gold]Plating[/gold] at the end of turn, keep your Block this turn.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FOX_BITE.title: Fox Bite
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAID_SUPPORT.title: Maid's Support
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FORGING.title: Forging
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FORGING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Gain {Materials:diff()} of each [gold]Material[/gold].
[gold]Craft[/gold] twice.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HELL_GIFT.title: Hell's Gift
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HELL_GIFT.description: Add a random [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[/gold]golden equipment card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_SWORD.title: Golden Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_SWORD.descript: For every 2 [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play, gain 1 Energy.{IfUpgraded:show:| All [gold]Attack[/gold] cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SNOW_BALL_OVERWHELMIN:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.
The next [gold]Skill[/gold] you play this turn costs 0.
